title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
author: openai-blog
raw_description: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
summary: OpenAI报告分析AI对欧盟就业市场的影响，指出哪些职业面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化，为劳动力转型提供数据洞察。
analysis_note: 报告聚焦AI对就业的影响，与LLM领域间接相关，数据有价值但技术深度一般。
